features: COMPACT AND SPACE SAVING THREE-SOCKET EXTENSION LEAD: From Masterplug at Luceco, shaped like a single adapter, this three-socket extension lead has two metres of cable
WITH INDIVIDUAL POWER INDICATED SWITCHED SOCKETS: You can individually control and use three electrical devices at the same time
USE EFFICIENTLY AROUND THE HOME WITH WALL FIXING CAPABILITY: Giving you the option to mount the extension lead onto the wall, if you are struggling with available ground space
KEEPS YOUR HOME AND WORKSPACES TIDY AND CLUTTER FREE: As the sockets sit on the front and sides of the adaptor, giving you enough room to even use moulded plugs
RECTANGLE COMPACT SPACE EFFICIENT DESIGN: Measuring 7.5 x 5 x 5 cm, the adaptor is rectangular as opposed to a long strip, making it more space efficient
description: From the manufacturer Masterplug Three Socket Extension Lead with Individual Switches, 2 Metres, White Control the power to each individual socket This three-socket extension lead from Masterplug at Luceco, allows you to individually control your plugged-in electrical appliances. The white moulded extension lead has three sockets each with their own individual switch, letting you control different appliances individually, which helps you save power and the risk of overheating. The extension lead also has a power indicator, which lets you know when the extension lead is plugged in. More Information Three socket 2-Metre cable 7.5 x 5 x 5 cm (18 x 2 x 1 inches) 1.0 mm cable Features Wall fixing capability Giving you the option to mount the extension lead onto the wall, if you are struggling with available ground space. Safe to use As it is manufactured to BS1363-2 and the non-rewireable double socket extension lead has a 13 Amp fuse and can safely reach 3120 Watts, 240 Volts. Slimline appearance With a rounded compact slimline appearance, the three-socket extension lead also has safety shuttered sockets. About Masterplug With over 75 years experience, the Luceco plc brands of Luceco LED lighting, BG Electrical, Masterplug and Ross are market leaders in key electrical categories, offering a "one stop shop" for trade and retail accessories. Masterplug is one of the most recognisable brands in the world and has been at the forefront of Portable Power for many decades. With a head office in London and global offices in four continents, Luceco has an impressive portfolio of over 2,500 product lines and are continually evolving product ranges, aligned to market trends. So, whether you’re looking for the best in LED lighting, top of the range extension leads, stylish socket covers or dimmer switches, Luceco is the brand that you can trust to deliver on quality production and performance.
